caption: A man with dark hair and skin, wearing a blue button-down shirt with a small red and white "INFO OBJECTS" logo on the chest, is speaking while wearing a thin head-worn microphone. He is positioned in front of a white backdrop featuring the logos "the CUBE" and "silicon ANGLE," along with a smaller "#BigDataSV" tag. A dark book or folder lies on the surface in front of him. Across the frames, the man remains in the same position, speaking with slight changes in his facial expression and mouth movement. In the bottom half of the scene, a blue banner appears containing a logo with a silhouette of a mammoth and the text "SPONSORED BY INFO-OBJECTS," followed by the text "RISHI YADAV | @meditativesoul," "CEO," and "info0objects." The background and overall setting remain static throughout the sequence.
